'''Anf Dec''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Colicoid/Legends|Colicoid]] and [[Starship/Legends|starship]] captain in the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
[[36 BBY/Legends|Four years before]] the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], Dec was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of a [[Colicoid/Legends|Colicoid]] [[Colicoid cargo ship|diplomatic ship]] that was attacked by the slave-[[Pirate/Legends|raider]] [[Krayn]], despite the presence of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|177|Dec, Captain Anf}}</ref>

Almost [[29 BBY/Legends|eight years later]], Kenobi and his apprentice, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], encountered Dec as not only the captain of a diplomatic ship, but also as one of the primary negotiators (along with [[Nor Fik]]) among the Colicoids, who wanted to secure from Krayn total control over the [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-processing operations within the [[Kessel system/Legends|Kessel system]] and at Nar Shaddaa.<ref name="JQ APtT" /><ref name="TCSWE" />

It was because of the Colicoids' entry into negotiations with Krayn that Dec and the other negotiators were furious with the pirate when, in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], he blatantly raided Dec's cargo ship after promising that he would thenceforth refrain from doing so. But it was also the Colicoids' suspicions of Krayn's duplicity that prompted their petitioning the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] and [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] to send "[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]]" (Kenobi and Skywalker) as protectors of Dec's ship as it traversed the space lanes where Krayn was known to be operating.<ref name="JQ APtT" />

Dec, despite his seeming hysteria and rage at Krayn's attack, was able to create a diversion (by flying erratically and releasing enough fire to keep the attackers busy) that allowed Kenobi and Skywalker to infiltrate the [[Krayn's pirate starship|pirate's ship]]. Because Krayn's engines weren't at full speed, the Jedi, in their small utility transport, were able to infiltrate through the raiders' exhaust port.<ref name="JQ APtT" />
